scripts.build-app: tauri build --bundles app && mkdir -p builds && rm -rf "builds/Claude Orchestrator.app" && cp -R "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Claude Orchestrator.app" "builds/Claude Orchestrator.app" && echo "App copied to builds/Claude Orchestrator.app"
scripts.build-dmg: npm run build-app && rm -f "builds/Claude Orchestrator.dmg" && hdiutil create -volname "Claude Orchestrator" -srcfolder "builds/Claude Orchestrator.app" -ov -format UDZO "builds/Claude Orchestrator.dmg" && echo "DMG created at builds/Claude Orchestrator.dmg"
